verses.text: Ka ta aw, ka thugente ciamteh in la, kong sawl thute khempeuh mangngilh ngei kei in
Kong gen bangin gamta lecin na nungta ding hi. Kong thuhilhte, na mitnauta bangin hoihtakin kem in
Kong hilhnate kem tawntung in la, na lungtang tungah gelh in
Pilna na sanggamnu dingin nei in la, thumuhna na lawm it pen dingin nei in
Tua hi leh midangte' zi tungah na khialhkhak lohna ding, kam khum tawh a hong zol numei ginalote tawh na khialhkhak lohna dingin hong hu ding hi
Khatvei, ka omna inn-ah, ka tawlet panin ka khuadak a
bangmah a phawk nailo tangval honkhat lakah, tangval thu theilo khat, ka lim muhkha hi
Lamdungah amah a vak laitakin, tua bang numei paktat a omna inn gei khatah va paikha a
tua hun pen nitak nitum khit zawh, khuamui hun laitak ahi hi
Tua numei in numei paktatte' puansilh ngeite a silh kawmin ngimna khat tawh tua tangval na dawntuah hi
Tua numei pen maizumna mel theiloin a hang mahmah hi a, lamdung tengah vak tawntung hi
Mihon omna van zuakna phual, lamdung citeng, kongkiu khatpeuhah mi ngakin om niloh hi
Tua numei in tangvalpa thakhatin kawi-in tawp a, na maitai bawl mahmahin ama kiangah
“Tuni-in biakpiakna ka bawl a, nek ding sa tampi ka nei hi
Ka nekpih dingin nang ka hong zong a, tu-in kong mu petmah hi
Ka lupna tungah a nop mahmah dingin, Egypt gam puan hoihpente ka phahzo hi
Myrrh paknamtui, aloes paknamtui, leh sinnamon paknamtui tawh, ka lupna tung a namtui dingin ka bawl khinta hi
Hong pai in; zanthapai-in ki-itna bawlin, ang kikawmin lungnuam ni
Bang hang hiam cih leh ka pasal khual gamlapi-ah zin a, tu laitakin inn-ah omlo hi
Amah in sum tampi keng a, nipikal nih bang mateng hong tunglo ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih manin kam khum kam neel tawh amah zol a, tangvalpa in tua zolna a mangkha hi
Tua ahih manin a kigo ding bawngtal in a sihna ding mun a zuat bangin, sakhi in a awkna ding thang zuanin a dian' laklak bangin
thaltang in ama lungtang a khakna ding munah amah va pai hi. Vasa in a sihna ding thang-antah a bawh bangin va bawh a, a lauhuai sung a tun' lamtak theilo hi
Ka tate aw, kei' lam hong nga un la, ka thugente hong ngai un
Tua bang numeite' zolna mang kei un la, tua bangte tawh khialkha kei un
Tua bang numei in mi tampi tak siasakin, simzawhloh ding mi tampi' sihna a piangsak hi
Tua bang numei zuihna pen sihna gam zuatna hi a, sih baihna ding lampi zuatna ahi hi.
